description_long: This is a classic cylindrical mailbox with a rounded top and flat ends, mounted on a sturdy rectangular wooden post. The mailbox body is a muted yellowish-tan color, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. A prominent red flag is attached to the left side near the front, indicating when mail is present for pickup. The front face appears to have a subtle seam, suggesting a hinged door for mail retrieval, while the back is solid and unadorned. The mailbox is elevated above the ground by the post, making it easily accessible from a standing position. There are no visible identification markings or numbers on the exterior.
description: A yellow-tan cylindrical mailbox with a red flag, mounted on a wooden post and featuring a front access door.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red flag raised on the left and the full length of the mailbox body atop the wooden post.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded face of the mailbox and the red flag edge visible on the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the red flag mostly hidden, showing the smooth mailbox body and post.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid, rounded back of the mailbox and the post beneath.
